announcement: Thanks for visiting CrestwoodWorkshop! All items handmade with care.
digital_sale_message: Thanks for picking up a piece from the shop. Each pen ships within two business days, packaged in a felt-lined gift box. Drop me a note if it's a gift and I'll leave the receipt out.
sale_message: Holiday lead time is two business days. Custom segmented orders ship in two to three weeks.
title: Handmade in Crestwood
